title: Crafter's Custom Maces (Unstable SMP)
description: A custom mace resourcepack for the Unstable HMP, but can be used on any other server
body:
A resourcepack with many custom mace textures for the Unstable HMP, but works on other servers.

Also has custom textures for non-named maces with enchantments, and custom textures for unobtainable maces (Breach + Density & Breach + Density + Wind Burst (of any level))

Current Mace Names Supported:
Gambit,
Crucible,
Incinerator,
Executioner,
Knightfall,
Vengeance,
Faith,
Tenacity,
Crimson Fortune,
Violet Pressurecore,
Violet Vanguard,
Descending Dark,
Crystal Comet,
EchoBreaker,
Unstable Gamble,
Onion Shard,
Onion Fragment,
Democracy,
Bolt,
Red Requiem,
Sweetfall,
Khalih Ht1,
Primordium,
Apostasy

Maces Showcase:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xtmE0veSONM
